title: Angry Animals 2
description: New bloody animals try to infect others like in a zombie apocalypse
body:
# Angry Animals 2
With this mod you will be careful when you go out with your animals at night because the angry animals would like to infect your animals

I can introduce you to a few of the angry animals


![The angry pig is a bloody pig that attacks and infects other pigs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cc81ce29a336487615ae9f79ef7e27c3c19fd1d.webp)


![There are 2 versions of the angry cow: the normal one and the shadow of angry cow. This is the normal angry cow. The normal angry cow has a special drop. It drops its tooth from which you can make bone meal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07744be6db7188a43e7d19c659cacd307f3671d3.webp)


![The angry sheep is a bloody sheep that attacks and infects normal sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57ec4b49d7d0a657602f9efb10f47e61f94b69f.webp)


![The angry chicken is very fast and attacks and infects chickens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01107335f2e96691b81aa0bd5cfe2fd62c9d7c8b.png)



# Spawn Eggs
![new spawn eggs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eda00116874277f4e7c699aca6d4bf9107fae892.png)

**the mod does not use the standard spawn eggs  
As with almost every mod, this mod also adds special new spawn eggs with which you can spawn the angry animals**

# behave

**All angry animals try to bite other animals and turn themselves into angry animals like in a zombie apocalypse They don't burn during the day but disappear, making the sound of a teleporting enderman**

# achievements
**In addition to the new mobs, the mod also adds 5 new achievements
-notwithme task kill an angry animals
-helped gronkh task kill an angry chicken
-dogkiller task kill an angry wolf
-dog trainer task calm an angry wolf
-sweet sweet foxes task kill an angry fox**

# New Items

![the new items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/591a5cfbe08ae2379d48d5fe4caae1addbed9778.png)

**The mod adds 4 new items with special features. The angry animal DNA is dropped from all angry animals. With the angry animal DNA you can turn normal animals into angry animals

Bloody Bone: This item is dropped by an angry wolf and you can turn angry wolves back into normal wolves
Angry Cow's Tooth: This item is dropped by an angry cow and can be processed into bone meal

bloody fish: this item works similarly to the bloody bones except that you can use it to transform angry ocelots into normal ocelots**
